1: Father, you made {name} to know you and to be glad in you. Let everything {name} loves best become a way of loving you more, today and for ever. Amen.
2: Lord, thank you for not leaving us to guess how to live. Your Word shows the way. Give {name} a heart that trusts what you have written more than what anyone else says. Amen.
3: God of truth, the Scriptures teach us who you are and what you ask of us. As {name} learns them, let them be less like homework and more like a letter from someone who loves him. Amen.
4: Great and holy God, you are bigger than everything you made, and you never change. When {name} feels small or the world feels shaky, remind him that you stay exactly as good as you have always been. Amen.
5: Lord, there is no one like you — not one. Keep {name} from giving his whole heart to things that cannot love him back, and keep it safe with you, the living and true God. Amen.
6: Father, Son, and Holy Spirit — one God, always loving, never divided. Teach {name} to be glad that you are bigger than what we can fully understand. Amen.
7: Lord, before the world began, you already knew and planned every good thing for us. Help {name} trust that your plans are kind, even the parts he cannot see yet. Amen.
8: God our Maker, everything you planned, you carry out — in making the world and in caring for it still. Help {name} see your hand in ordinary days. Amen.
9: Father, you spoke, and everything good came to be — out of nothing at all. When {name} makes things, let him remember the joy of the One who made him. Amen.
10: Lord, you made people in your own image — {name} too. Help him treat every person he meets this week as someone who carries your likeness. Amen.
_comment: Compiled from approved Markdown prayers. Edit content/programs/<slug>/prayers/*.md, then run npm run prayers:compile.
